_README: Make Scenario Blueprint — Phase 5: Weekly Ops Dashboard. A scheduled scenario that runs every Monday morning and emails the supervisor a 7-day performance summary across all talent inboxes. Provides week-over-week trend visibility that the daily digest cannot.
_import_instructions: 1. Import this blueprint into Make as a new standalone scenario.
2. Set the schedule to run Monday mornings (recommend 8:30 AM — 30 minutes after the daily digest).
4. This scenario does NOT need to be cloned — one instance covers all inboxes.
5. Activate only after Phase 3 (daily digest) is stable and at least 7 days of log data exists.
name: Phase 5 — Weekly Ops Dashboard

parameters._time_comment: Runs at 8:30 AM every Monday — 30 minutes after the daily digest so the supervisor gets both reports before starting their week.

parameters._spreadsheetId_comment: TODO: Fill in the master log Google Sheet ID.

conditions._comment: All log rows from the past 7 days.

parameters._limit_comment: Set high enough to capture a full week across all 16+ inboxes.

value._comment: Groups rows by Talent Name and computes per-talent metrics. Make's filter/map functions are used here. Talent names are hardcoded from config/settings.json.
value.rows: {{map(['Sylvia','Trin','Sam','Britt','Allee','Lizz','Katrina','Jenn','Angela','Colleen','Alana','Grayson','Kylika','Anastasiya','KatrinaD','Michaela'], name => {'talent': name, 'total': length(filter(2.rows, r => r.`Talent Name` == name)), 'replied': length(filter(2.rows, r => r.`Talent Name` == name AND r.`Reply Sent` == 'TRUE')), 'trash': length(filter(2.rows, r => r.`Talent Name` == name AND r.`AI Score Label` == 'trash')), 'uncertain': length(filter(2.rows, r => r.`Talent Name` == name AND r.`AI Score Label` == 'uncertain')), 'escalated': length(filter(2.rows, r => r.`Talent Name` == name AND r.`Action Taken` == 'escalated to human'))})}}

parameters.name: dashboard_html
parameters.value:
Weekly Ops Dashboard — {{formatDate(dateAdd(now, -7, 'days'), 'MMM D')}} – {{formatDate(now, 'MMM D, YYYY')}}

⚠️ Flagged for Human Review{{3.weekly_stats.total_uncertain}}{{3.weekly_stats.uncertain_rate_pct}}%

❌ Processing Errors' + 3.weekly_stats.total_errors + '—

Talent Total Replied Trash Review Escalated
' + t.talent + '' + t.total + '' + t.replied + '' + t.trash + '' + t.uncertain + '' + t.escalated + '

Health Indicators

{{if(3.weekly_stats.uncertain_rate_pct > 30, '⚠️ HIGH REVIEW RATE: ' + 3.weekly_stats.uncertain_rate_pct + '% of emails needed human review this week (target: under 20%). Consider tuning the triage prompt — many Score 2s may indicate the AI is being too conservative.', '✅ Review rate is within target range (' + 3.weekly_stats.uncertain_rate_pct + '%).')}}

{{if(3.weekly_stats.trash_rate_pct > 80, '⚠️ VERY HIGH TRASH RATE: ' + 3.weekly_stats.trash_rate_pct + '% of emails scored as trash. Verify the triage prompt is not being too aggressive — check Gmail Trash folders for any misclassified real opportunities.', '✅ Trash rate looks normal (' + 3.weekly_stats.trash_rate_pct + '%).')}}

{{if(3.weekly_stats.total_errors > 0, '❌ ' + 3.weekly_stats.total_errors + ' email(s) failed to process this week. Check the Error Log tab in the master log sheet and the Error Log tab for details.', '✅ No processing errors this week.')}}

Weekly Ops Dashboard — Talent Inbox Automation. To adjust settings: config/settings.json. To tune triage: prompts/triage.md. QA test suite: tests/triage_test_cases.json.

parameters._connection_comment: TODO: Set this to the supervisor's Gmail connection in Make.
parameters._to_comment: TODO: Fill in supervisor email. Same recipient as daily digest.
parameters.subject: Weekly Ops Report — {{formatDate(dateAdd(now, -7, 'days'), 'MMM D')}}–{{formatDate(now, 'MMM D')}} — {{3.weekly_stats.total_processed}} emails, {{3.weekly_stats.total_replied}} replied, {{3.weekly_stats.uncertain_rate_pct}}% review rate

metadata._zone_comment: TODO: Update to your Make workspace zone.

_health_thresholds._comment: Thresholds used in the health indicators section of the dashboard email. Adjust as the system matures.
_health_thresholds._uncertain_note: If more than 30% of emails go to Score 2 (human review), the triage prompt may be too conservative. Review Score 2 emails from the week to identify patterns and refine the prompt.
_health_thresholds._trash_note: If more than 80% of emails are scored as trash, verify the triage prompt is not being overly aggressive. Sample 10-15 trash emails from that week.
_health_thresholds._target_note: After 4+ weeks of tuning, a healthy system should route fewer than 20% of emails to human review.
_health_thresholds._reply_rate_note: Of emails that are NOT trash, at least 70% should be auto-replied by Phase 2. Lower rates indicate ESCALATE flags are too broad or offer types are not matching SOP rows.

Set Gmail connection to supervisor's account
Confirm timezone matches the daily digest (America/New_York default)
Review health threshold values in _health_thresholds and adjust for your team's reality after Week 1
Consider adding a second recipient (e.g. the agency owner) for the weekly report after the system is stable
